Reasoning: The analysis of the current hospital visit record reveals a complex constellation of severe, interconnected comorbidities, including Intestinal or peritoneal adhesions with obstruction (postoperative) (postinfection), Other specified intestinal malabsorption, Other ascites, Urinary tract infection, site not specified, Infection and inflammatory reaction due to other vascular device, implant, and graft, Malignant neoplasm of bronchus and lung, unspecified, Bacteremia, Atrial fibrillation, Congestive heart failure, unspecified, and Malignant neoplasm of bronchus and lung, unspecified. The patient is receiving various supportive and infectious medications, such as Ciprofloxacin IV, D5W, Potassium Chl 20 mEq / 1000 mL D5 1/2 NS, LR, Multivitamin IV, Amino Acids 4.25% W/ Dextrose 5%, Ipratropium Bromide Neb, Albumin 5% (25g / 500mL), Sodium Chloride 0.9% Flush, HYDROmorphone (Dilaudid), Acetaminophen, Phenylephrine, Magnesium Sulfate, Calcium Gluconate, Potassium Chloride, Diltiazem, D10W, Zol
